rules: Monitor local OliviaAI bridge and CloudSwarm resolver.
Refresh BFE, satcount, and CloudSwarm snapshots.
Publish static Pages mirror from gh-pages branch root.
Detect stale logical TGDK nodes from inventory/live heartbeat.
Do not publish secrets, tokens, installer scripts, or runtime credentials.
Do not command, probe, or claim third-party satellite or carrier control.
Quarantine means logical exclusion from TGDK resolver selection only.
